steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
To find the intersection, set the two expressions for y equal: $$5x+8 = 6x-2$$.
Subtract $5x$ from both sides: $$8 = x-2$$.
Add 2 to both sides: $$x = 10$$.

steps.title: Find the y‑coordinate
steps.content:
Substitute $x=10$ into either original equation; using $y=5x+8$ gives $$y = 5(10)+8 = 50+8 = 58$$.
Thus the intersection point is $(10,58)$.
That confirms C is correct.
